text.title: ES Projections Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping view shape + consistency need to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is a separate read-model view actually needed (distinct from aggregate state)?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology: query the aggregate via from_events

branch.question: Does the view tolerate eventual consistency (subsecond → minutes of lag)?

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology: projections lag; use a read-through cache or synchronous read of the aggregate

branch.question: Will the schema/logic change over time (requiring rebuild)?

conclusion.verdict: full projection with checkpoint + rebuild script + quarterly rehearsal
projection with idempotent UPSERTs + checkpoint; rebuild script still required for DR

text.example: view_needed=true → tolerates_eventual=true → schema_evolves=true → full projection with checkpoint + rebuild + quarterly rehearsal.
